Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fishŚwherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul, Perry, and Dan head east of Timmins to the historic waters of Frederick House Lake for a late-season ice adventure under warm, spring-like skies. What starts as a perfect day on the hardwater quickly turns into a multispecies showcaseŚpike, perch, walleye, and sauger all keep the crew busy as the bite fires up. But as Northern Ontario weather often reminds us, conditions shift fast. With the wind picking up and clouds rolling in, the team wraps up an incredible day and makes their way home, grateful for one more memorable outing before the thaw.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake

Video.summary: We saved the best for last. Part three of our Cedros adventure has fantastic fishing for three different species. Big Yellowtail in the morning, Epic calico bass at the famous Chesters rock during the afternoon, and some epic kelp paddy Dorado fishing on the way home.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure, Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Father Son Challenge Part 1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Father Son Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode, we venture out onto Porcupine Lake for some beautiful walleye action with Craig Salmonson from Timmins Angling Adventures. Patience was key as we waited for a break in challenging weather conditionsŚbut it all paid off with an unforgettable day on the water. Tune in for expert tips, stunning scenery, and the thrill of fishing in Northern Ontario!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Weathering the Storm: Walleye on Porcupine Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We brought in Tony Roach to talk about a popular topic in these parts: summer walleye fishing! Lots of good tips packed into this week's episode, especially if you're a fan of the gravel lizard!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Summer Walleye Strategies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson head to Eagle Lake in Sunset Country to cast for big muskies during the summer to fall transition
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Giant Eagle Lake Muskies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman's Pro vs Joe-All -Snook- Up
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - All -Snook- Up
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on larry smith the dynamic duo is back for an action packed walleye show out on the bay of green bay
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | EARLY Spring Walleyes Oconto
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The next few episodes are special because the crew heads down to the famous Cedros Island fishing for giant Yellowtail, Dorado, and Calico Bass. This trip is nothing new to us; Shea McIntee and the crew have been fishing at Cedros Island for more than a decade and always stay at Cedros Outdoor Adventurers because of their excellent staff, beautiful resort, and fantastic fishing boats and captains.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al and James Lindner use the new Rapala PXR Mavrik 110 Jerkbait to catch both smallmouth and walleyes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Multispecies Mavriks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Smallmouth Bass in quantities in this episode. A Thanksgiving tradition.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Smallmouth Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lake X Largemouths
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Lake X Largemouths
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Non stop Northern Pike action on Porcupine Lake .
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Porcupine Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Keith Lorensen is no stranger to water, he spent many years at sea during his service in the U.S. Navy. Back in October of 2000, Keith was injured during a terrorist attack on the historic USS Cole.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Navy Veteran Keith Lorensen
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hook Line and Snook
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Hook Line and Snook
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Larry takes us on the clear waters of Lake Michigan for some amazing salmon fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Charter Boating Milwaukee

Video.summary: Over the last few weeks, Shea McIntee and the crew have been hanging out in Gustavus, Alaska, the southern gateway to Glacier Bay National Park. Mother Nature has blessed us with lovely weather that has allowed us to observe its incredible surroundings, animals, and whales. Halibut fishing has been off the charts, especially using jigs in shallow water. Today, we saved the best for last and get into one big halibut after another. Stoked on Alaska. Here we go!
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked On Fishing
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing Ś Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing Ś Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4
Stoked on Fishing Ś Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4
Stoked on Fishing Ś Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes brackish water for bass amd stipers
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Salty Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Finding Bass on a river can mean covering miles of water
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | River Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with two-time BASS winner Bill Lowen about his most recent win.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Bill Lowen
Video.title: Episode 1
